aiNews: KPMG关于AI的报告被发现充斥AI幻觉，引发对专业机构AI应用可靠性的质疑。
Anthropic员工将与白宫官员会面，讨论AI安全限制措施，反映监管压力升级。
加拿大总理警告美国限制Anthropic模型，凸显过度依赖单一供应商的供应链风险。

articles.titleEn: Between June 08 and June 13, 2026, as many as 23 Indian startups from diverse sectors raised over $244 million in funding from investors. These sectors include Robotics, Wealthtec, Quick Commerce, Deeptech, Fitness, Retail, Healthcare, AI, Fintech, EV, M
articles.titleZh: 2026年6月8日至13日期间，多达23家来自不同领域的印度初创公司从投资者处融资超过2.44亿美元
articles.abstractEn: Between June 08 and June 13, 2026, as many as 23 Indian startups from diverse sectors raised over $244 million in funding from investors. These sectors include Robotics, Wealthtec, Quick Commerce, Deeptech, Fitness, Retail, Healthcare, AI, Fintech, EV, M  instagram.com
articles.abstractZh: 2026年6月8日至13日期间，多达23家来自不同领域的印度初创公司从投资者处融资超过2.44亿美元。这些领域包括机器人技术、财富科技、即时零售、深度科技、健身、零售、医疗健康、人工智能、金融科技、电动汽车等。  instagram.com
